series_metadata.series_description: Electronic files that show outstanding failed trade information as of the close of the previous business day. Failed trades are transactions that do not settle on the agreed-upon settlement date. Files in this series are downloaded daily by Treasurer personnel from the websites of custodial banks or are received from the custodial banks by email.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 6 fiscal years., Electronic: Delete
